findings.summary: Detected 6 suspicious transactions across 7 anomaly patterns.

structuring.title: Structuring / Smurfing
structuring.description: Breaking down large transactions into smaller amounts to avoid reporting thresholds.

circular_trading.title: Circular Trading
circular_trading.description: Funds moving through multiple accounts only to return to the original source or beneficiary.
